summary: The user is organizing their new apartment and seeks recommendations for apps and tools to track belongings and decorate their space. They plan to try Sortly and Planner 5D and have also started exploring their neighborhood, discovering parks and cafes while taking daily walks. The user is considering starting a walking journal and incorporating outdoor yoga sessions into their routine.
facts: The user has recently moved into a new apartment and is organizing it. The user plans to try the apps Sortly and Planner 5D for organization and decoration. The user has found a great coffee spot near their apartment that has become their go-to place for coffee and catching up on emails. The user has been taking daily walks for about 3 weeks to explore their neighborhood and has discovered parks and cafes. The user is considering starting a walking journal to track their progress and note interesting things they come across. The user is getting back into yoga and is thinking about incorporating outdoor yoga sessions in one of the parks they have discovered.
